description: Call GET /api/toutiao/get-user-detail/v1 for Toutiao User Profile through JustOneAPI with userId.

operations.description: Get Toutiao user Profile data, including user ID, nickname, and avatar, for influencer profiling and audience analysis and monitoring creator performance and growth.

parameters.description: Authentication token required to access the API.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the Toutiao user.
parameters.name: userId
